# Lyon

> Geotechnical engineering company in France, providing professional services in soil mechanics, foundation engineering and site investigation.

## Services
- [Amelioration](https://lyon.geotechnique.sbs/amelioration/)
- [Analyse Damplification Sismique](https://lyon.geotechnique.sbs/analyse-damplification-sismique/)
- [Analyse Geotechnique Tunnels Sols](https://lyon.geotechnique.sbs/analyse-geotechnique-tunnels-sols/)
- [Analyse Lerosion Sols](https://lyon.geotechnique.sbs/analyse-lerosion-sols/)
- [Analyse Pieux Frottement Lateral](https://lyon.geotechnique.sbs/analyse-pieux-frottement-lateral/)
- [Analyse Stabilite Pentes](https://lyon.geotechnique.sbs/analyse-stabilite-pentes/)
- [Analyse Tassement Differentiel](https://lyon.geotechnique.sbs/analyse-tassement-differentiel/)
- [Au Dilatometre Plat](https://lyon.geotechnique.sbs/au-dilatometre-plat/)
- [Cbr Laboratoire](https://lyon.geotechnique.sbs/cbr-laboratoire/)
- [Compression Simple](https://lyon.geotechnique.sbs/compression-simple/)
- [Conception Colonnes Ballastees](https://lyon.geotechnique.sbs/conception-colonnes-ballastees/)
- [Conception Compactage Dynamique](https://lyon.geotechnique.sbs/conception-compactage-dynamique/)
- [Conception Drains Verticaux Prefabriques](https://lyon.geotechnique.sbs/conception-drains-verticaux-prefabriques/)

- [Conception Remblais Routiers](https://lyon.geotechnique.sbs/conception-remblais-routiers/)
- [Conception Stabilisation Pentes](https://lyon.geotechnique.sbs/conception-stabilisation-pentes/)
- [Consolidation Œdometrique](https://lyon.geotechnique.sbs/consolidation-œdometrique/)
- [Drainage Routier Geotechnique](https://lyon.geotechnique.sbs/drainage-routier-geotechnique/)

- [Etude Cbr Conception Routiere](https://lyon.geotechnique.sbs/etude-cbr-conception-routiere/)

## Contact
- Website: https://lyon.geotechnique.sbs/

## About
This page provides information about geotechnical engineering services available in France.
The company complies with local and international standards including ASTM, ISO and country-specific norms.
